package.name: cartesian_path_demo
package.description: Straight-line Cartesian path with MoveIt's computeCartesianPath for the myCobot 280 in the HPLC autosampler cell. Moves the gripper hover -> down 5 cm -> up 5 cm with the end-effector path constrained to a straight line in 3D space. Implements checklist item 22 (autosampler tie-in).
